● Is Ancestry Absent From Training Individuals ● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual ID Individuals ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Replication Ancestry Label CohortReplications ● Ancestry Label Individuals ● Has Cryptic Relatedness Flag Individuals

Derived: holdout requires measured transport; in-training is vacuously safe.

ƒ Transport Gate Status Calculated 13 hops from ground truth string DR-161
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's transport gate status is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “NotApplicable” if it is not the case that the is ancestry holdout flag is set
  2. the literal “PASS-tested” if the is transportable to absent ancestry flag is set
  3. the literal “FAIL” otherwise
In English

If not is ancestry holdout then "NotApplicable", otherwise if is transportable to absent ancestry then "PASS-tested", otherwise "FAIL".

As a formula
= IF(NOT(Is Ancestry Holdout), "NotApplicable", IF(Is Transportable to Absent Ancestry, "PASS-tested", "FAIL"))
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
ƒIs Ancestry HoldoutIndividualPredictions The is ancestry absent from training of the linked individual. ƒIs Transportable to Absent AncestryIndividualPredictions If is ancestry holdout, individual cross ancestry node count is at least 1, and not has spurious correlation flag then true(), otherwise false().
Ground truth at the leaves 34 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Is Ancestry Absent From Training Individuals ● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual ID Individuals ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Replication Ancestry Label CohortReplications ● Ancestry Label Individuals ● Has Cryptic Relatedness Flag Individuals

RENDER ONLY (does NOT feed the keystone): honest three-state view of the transport gate so a vacuous in-training pass is never shown as evidentiary. NotApplicable = in-training ancestry (gate did not bite); PASS-tested = holdout with a confirmed cross-ancestry transport; FAIL = holdout without one. Sits beside IsAncestryTransportSafe (which the keystone still reads) purely to keep the writeup from implying transport evidence it never used.

ƒ Is High Confidence Prediction Calculated 12 hops from ground truth boolean DR-162
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's is high confidence prediction is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if all of these hold:
    • the calibrated uncertainty is at least 0.7
    • it is not the case that the has spurious correlation flag is set
  2. false otherwise
In English

If calibrated uncertainty is at least 0.7 and not has spurious correlation flag then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(AND(Calibrated Uncertainty >= 0.7, NOT(Has Spurious Correlation Flag)), TRUE(), FALSE())
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
ƒCalibrated UncertaintyIndividualPredictions If (1 minus mean bin abs error) is less than 0 then 0, otherwise (1 minus mean bin abs error) times well calibrated fraction. ƒHas Spurious Correlation FlagIndividualPredictions If not rests on confirmed mechanism or individual has cryptic relatedness then true(), otherwise false().
Consumers 2 direct +2 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Is Clinically Actionable IndividualPredictions ƒ Lifecycle State Key IndividualPredictions Deciding Gate IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 36 the raw values this ultimately depends on

Derived: calibrated AND not spurious.

ƒ Patient Stratification Tier Calculated 11 hops from ground truth string DR-163
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's patient stratification tier is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “High-Risk Pathway” if the predicted value is at least 7
  2. the literal “Moderate-Risk Pathway” if the predicted value is at least 4
  3. the literal “Low-Risk Pathway” otherwise
In English

If predicted value is at least 7 then "High-Risk Pathway", otherwise if predicted value is at least 4 then "Moderate-Risk Pathway", otherwise "Low-Risk Pathway".

As a formula
= IF(Predicted Value >= 7, "High-Risk Pathway", IF(Predicted Value >= 4, "Moderate-Risk Pathway", "Low-Risk Pathway"))
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
ƒPredicted ValueIndividualPredictions If ((2 times individual causal mass) plus (1.5 times individual confirmed node count)) is greater than 10 then 10, otherwise ((2 times individual causal mass) plus (1.5 times individual confirmed node count)).
Ground truth at the leaves 30 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Individual ID Individuals ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms

Derived risk tier from the derived PredictedValue.

ƒ Predicted Severity Value Calculated 3 hops from ground truth number DR-164
In RuleSpeak

An individual prediction's predicted severity value is computed as the individual max severity score.

In English

Individual max severity score.

As a formula
= Individual Max Severity Score
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
↗Individual Max Severity ScoreIndividualPredictions If individual is "" then 0, otherwise the max severity score of the linked individual.
Consumers 1 direct rules that read this one
ƒ Severity Tier IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 4 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Severity Score ClinicalPhenotypes ● Individual ClinicalPhenotypes ● Individual ID Individuals

Derived severity prediction grounded in the individual's max clinical SeverityScore.

ƒ Severity Tier Calculated 4 hops from ground truth string DR-165
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's severity tier is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “Severe” if the predicted severity value is greater than 7
  2. the literal “Moderate” if the predicted severity value is at least 4
  3. the literal “Mild” otherwise
In English

If predicted severity value is greater than 7 then "Severe", otherwise if predicted severity value is at least 4 then "Moderate", otherwise "Mild".

As a formula
= IF(Predicted Severity Value > 7, "Severe", IF(Predicted Severity Value >= 4, "Moderate", "Mild"))
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
ƒPredicted Severity ValueIndividualPredictions Individual max severity score.
Ground truth at the leaves 4 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Severity Score ClinicalPhenotypes ● Individual ClinicalPhenotypes ● Individual ID Individuals

Derived severity band from the predicted severity value.

ƒ Is Severity Actionable Calculated 12 hops from ground truth boolean DR-166
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's is severity actionable is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if all of these hold:
    • the individual has high severity phenotype flag is set
    • the rests on confirmed mechanism flag is set
    • it is not the case that the has spurious correlation flag is set
  2. false otherwise
In English

If individual has high severity phenotype, rests on confirmed mechanism, and not has spurious correlation flag then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(AND(Individual Has High Severity Phenotype, Rests on Confirmed Mechanism, NOT(Has Spurious Correlation Flag)), TRUE(), FALSE())
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
↗Individual Has High Severity PhenotypeIndividualPredictions If individual is "" then false(), otherwise the has high severity phenotype of the linked individual. ƒRests on Confirmed MechanismIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false(). ƒHas Spurious Correlation FlagIndividualPredictions If not rests on confirmed mechanism or individual has cryptic relatedness then true(), otherwise false().
Consumers 1 direct rules that read this one
ƒ Severity Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 33 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual ClinicalPhenotypes ● Individual ID Individuals ● Severity Score ClinicalPhenotypes ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Has Cryptic Relatedness Flag Individuals

Derived: a high-severity phenotype on a confirmed, non-spurious mechanism. Chained to the onset gates so severity can never be actionable on a debunked mechanism.

ƒ Severity Deciding Factor Calculated 13 hops from ground truth string DR-167
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's severity deciding factor is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “HighSeverityOnConfirmedMechanism” if the is severity actionable flag is set
  2. the literal “NotHighSeverity” if it is not the case that the individual has high severity phenotype flag is set
  3. the literal “NoValidatedMechanism” if it is not the case that the rests on confirmed mechanism flag is set
  4. the literal “SpuriousFlag” if the has spurious correlation flag is set
  5. the literal “Undetermined” otherwise
In English

If is severity actionable then "HighSeverityOnConfirmedMechanism", otherwise if not individual has high severity phenotype then "NotHighSeverity", otherwise if not rests on confirmed mechanism then "NoValidatedMechanism", otherwise if has spurious correlation flag then "SpuriousFlag", otherwise "Undetermined".

As a formula
= IF(Is Severity Actionable, "HighSeverityOnConfirmedMechanism", IF(NOT(Individual Has High Severity Phenotype), "NotHighSeverity", IF(NOT(Rests on Confirmed Mechanism), "NoValidatedMechanism", IF(Has Spurious Correlation Flag, "SpuriousFlag", "Undetermined"))))
Inputs 4 fields this rule reads
ƒIs Severity ActionableIndividualPredictions If individual has high severity phenotype, rests on confirmed mechanism, and not has spurious correlation flag then true(), otherwise false(). ↗Individual Has High Severity PhenotypeIndividualPredictions If individual is "" then false(), otherwise the has high severity phenotype of the linked individual. ƒRests on Confirmed MechanismIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false(). ƒHas Spurious Correlation FlagIndividualPredictions If not rests on confirmed mechanism or individual has cryptic relatedness then true(), otherwise false().
Ground truth at the leaves 33 the raw values this ultimately depends on

Why severity is/ isn't actionable — the single deciding reason.

In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's is treatment response actionable is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if the individual has predicted treatment response flag is set
  2. false otherwise
In English

If individual has predicted treatment response then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(Individual Has Predicted Treatment Response, TRUE(), FALSE())

Derived: the individual has a treatment predicted to respond (effective therapy on a confirmed mechanism). The third prediction type — independent of onset/severity.

ƒ Treatment Response Deciding Factor Calculated 14 hops from ground truth string DR-169
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's treatment response deciding factor is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “EffectiveOnConfirmedMechanism” if the is treatment response actionable flag is set
  2. the literal “NoEffectiveTreatmentOnMechanism” if the rests on confirmed mechanism flag is set
  3. the literal “NoConfirmedMechanism” otherwise
In English

If is treatment response actionable then "EffectiveOnConfirmedMechanism", otherwise if rests on confirmed mechanism then "NoEffectiveTreatmentOnMechanism", otherwise "NoConfirmedMechanism".

As a formula
= IF(Is Treatment Response Actionable, "EffectiveOnConfirmedMechanism", IF(Rests on Confirmed Mechanism, "NoEffectiveTreatmentOnMechanism", "NoConfirmedMechanism"))
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
ƒIs Treatment Response ActionableIndividualPredictions If individual has predicted treatment response then true(), otherwise false(). ƒRests on Confirmed MechanismIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false().

Why treatment-response is/ isn't actionable for this individual.

ƒ Is Clinically Actionable Calculated 14 hops from ground truth boolean DR-170
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's is clinically actionable is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if all of these hold:
    • the is high confidence prediction flag is set
    • the is falsifiability backed flag is set
    • the is ancestry transport safe flag is set
    • the predicted value is greater than 0
  2. false otherwise
In English

If is high confidence prediction, is falsifiability backed, is ancestry transport safe, and predicted value is greater than 0 then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(AND(Is High Confidence Prediction, Is Falsifiability Backed, Is Ancestry Transport Safe, Predicted Value > 0), TRUE(), FALSE())
Inputs 4 fields this rule reads
ƒIs High Confidence PredictionIndividualPredictions If calibrated uncertainty is at least 0.7 and not has spurious correlation flag then true(), otherwise false(). ƒIs Falsifiability BackedIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false(). ƒIs Ancestry Transport SafeIndividualPredictions If is ancestry holdout then is transportable to absent ancestry, otherwise true(). ƒPredicted ValueIndividualPredictions If ((2 times individual causal mass) plus (1.5 times individual confirmed node count)) is greater than 10 then 10, otherwise ((2 times individual causal mass) plus (1.5 times individual confirmed node count)).
Consumers 2 direct rules that read this one
ƒ Deciding Gate IndividualPredictions ƒ Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 39 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual Prediction CalibrationBins ● Individual Prediction ID IndividualPredictions ● Predicted Probability Band CalibrationBins ● Observed Event Rate CalibrationBins ● Coverage Count CalibrationBins ● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Individual ID Individuals ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Has Cryptic Relatedness Flag Individuals ● Is Ancestry Absent From Training Individuals ● Replication Ancestry Label CohortReplications ● Ancestry Label Individuals

KEYSTONE: TRUE only when the prediction is high-confidence (calibrated + not spurious), falsifiability-backed, ancestry-transport-safe, and rests on a non-null derived magnitude.

ƒ Lifecycle State Key Calculated 14 hops from ground truth string DR-171
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's lifecycle state key is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “Actionable” if all of these hold:
    • the is high confidence prediction flag is set
    • the is falsifiability backed flag is set
    • the is ancestry transport safe flag is set
    • the predicted value is greater than 0
  2. the literal “NotActionable” if any of these hold:
    • it is not the case that the rests on confirmed mechanism flag is set
    • it is not the case that the is falsifiability backed flag is set
  3. the literal “NotActionable” if the individual has cryptic relatedness flag is set
  4. the literal “NotActionable” if the calibrated uncertainty is less than 0.7
  5. the literal “NotActionable” if it is not the case that the is ancestry transport safe flag is set
  6. the literal “Actionable” otherwise
In English

If is high confidence prediction, is falsifiability backed, is ancestry transport safe, and predicted value is greater than 0 then "Actionable", otherwise if not rests on confirmed mechanism or not is falsifiability backed then "NotActionable", otherwise if individual has cryptic relatedness then "NotActionable", otherwise if calibrated uncertainty is less than 0.7 then "NotActionable", otherwise if not is ancestry transport safe then "NotActionable", otherwise "Actionable".

As a formula
= IF(AND(Is High Confidence Prediction,Is Falsifiability Backed,Is Ancestry Transport Safe,Predicted Value>0),"Actionable",IF(OR(NOT(Rests on Confirmed Mechanism),NOT(Is Falsifiability Backed)),"NotActionable",IF(Individual Has Cryptic Relatedness,"NotActionable",IF(Calibrated Uncertainty<0.7,"NotActionable",IF(NOT(Is Ancestry Transport Safe),"NotActionable","Actionable")))))
Inputs 7 fields this rule reads
ƒIs High Confidence PredictionIndividualPredictions If calibrated uncertainty is at least 0.7 and not has spurious correlation flag then true(), otherwise false(). ƒIs Falsifiability BackedIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false(). ƒIs Ancestry Transport SafeIndividualPredictions If is ancestry holdout then is transportable to absent ancestry, otherwise true(). ƒPredicted ValueIndividualPredictions If ((2 times individual causal mass) plus (1.5 times individual confirmed node count)) is greater than 10 then 10, otherwise ((2 times individual causal mass) plus (1.5 times individual confirmed node count)). ƒRests on Confirmed MechanismIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false(). ↗Individual Has Cryptic RelatednessIndividualPredictions If individual is "" then false(), otherwise the has cryptic relatedness flag of the linked individual. ƒCalibrated UncertaintyIndividualPredictions If (1 minus mean bin abs error) is less than 0 then 0, otherwise (1 minus mean bin abs error) times well calibrated fraction.
Ground truth at the leaves 39 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual Prediction CalibrationBins ● Individual Prediction ID IndividualPredictions ● Predicted Probability Band CalibrationBins ● Observed Event Rate CalibrationBins ● Coverage Count CalibrationBins ● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Individual ID Individuals ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Has Cryptic Relatedness Flag Individuals ● Is Ancestry Absent From Training Individuals ● Replication Ancestry Label CohortReplications ● Ancestry Label Individuals

DERIVED current lifecycle state (never entered): the single deciding gate determines whether the case lands on Actionable or NotActionable. Subject-state column of the diagnosis-lifecycle machine.

ƒ Deciding Gate Calculated 15 hops from ground truth string DR-172
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's deciding gate is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “AllGatesPass” if the is clinically actionable flag is set
  2. the literal “NoValidatedMechanism” if it is not the case that the rests on confirmed mechanism flag is set
  3. the literal “CrypticRelatedness” if the individual has cryptic relatedness flag is set
  4. the literal “Calibration” if the calibrated uncertainty is less than 0.7
  5. the literal “AncestryTransport” if it is not the case that the is ancestry transport safe flag is set
  6. the literal “Undetermined” otherwise
In English

If is clinically actionable then "AllGatesPass", otherwise if not rests on confirmed mechanism then "NoValidatedMechanism", otherwise if individual has cryptic relatedness then "CrypticRelatedness", otherwise if calibrated uncertainty is less than 0.7 then "Calibration", otherwise if not is ancestry transport safe then "AncestryTransport", otherwise "Undetermined".

As a formula
= IF(Is Clinically Actionable,"AllGatesPass",IF(NOT(Rests on Confirmed Mechanism),"NoValidatedMechanism",IF(Individual Has Cryptic Relatedness,"CrypticRelatedness",IF(Calibrated Uncertainty<0.7,"Calibration",IF(NOT(Is Ancestry Transport Safe),"AncestryTransport","Undetermined")))))
Inputs 5 fields this rule reads
ƒIs Clinically ActionableIndividualPredictions If is high confidence prediction, is falsifiability backed, is ancestry transport safe, and predicted value is greater than 0 then true(), otherwise false(). ƒRests on Confirmed MechanismIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false(). ↗Individual Has Cryptic RelatednessIndividualPredictions If individual is "" then false(), otherwise the has cryptic relatedness flag of the linked individual. ƒCalibrated UncertaintyIndividualPredictions If (1 minus mean bin abs error) is less than 0 then 0, otherwise (1 minus mean bin abs error) times well calibrated fraction. ƒIs Ancestry Transport SafeIndividualPredictions If is ancestry holdout then is transportable to absent ancestry, otherwise true().
Ground truth at the leaves 39 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual Prediction CalibrationBins ● Individual Prediction ID IndividualPredictions ● Predicted Probability Band CalibrationBins ● Observed Event Rate CalibrationBins ● Coverage Count CalibrationBins ● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Individual ID Individuals ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Has Cryptic Relatedness Flag Individuals ● Is Ancestry Absent From Training Individuals ● Replication Ancestry Label CohortReplications ● Ancestry Label Individuals

DERIVED single primary deciding gate (never entered), named in keystone-AND priority order. 'AllGatesPass' when actionable. When the case rests on no validated mechanism (no confirmed causal node), Falsifiability, Confidence, and Magnitude are one and the same finding, reported as 'NoValidatedMechanism' rather than split across three gates. Otherwise the lone failing gate is named: CrypticRelatedness, Calibration, AncestryTransport.

⇢ Calibration Bins Relationship string

A pointer to Calibration Bin. It is not derived from anything else — it is the link the rest of the DAG hangs off.

Reliability bins for this prediction.

↗ Individual Target Pathway Lookup 4 hops from ground truth string DR-173
In RuleSpeak

An individual prediction's individual target pathway is the target pathway of the individual prediction's individual.

In English

The target pathway of the linked individual.

As a formula
= INDEX(Target Pathway, MATCH(Individual, Individual ID, 0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
ƒTarget PathwayIndividuals If target pathway code equals 1 then "type-I-IFN", otherwise if target pathway code equals 2 then "B-cell/autoantibody", otherwise if target pathway code equals 3 then "T-cell-costim", otherwise if target pathway code equals 4 then "IL-17/23", otherwise "". ●IndividualIndividualPredictions Individual predicted. ●Individual IDIndividuals Stable identifier for each individual in the million-person cohort.
Consumers 2 direct rules that read this one
ƒ Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions ƒ Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 4 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Target Pathway CausalMechanisms ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Individual ID Individuals ● Individual IndividualPredictions

TargetPathway resolved on the individual (decoded from the mechanism).

↗ Individual Progression State Key Lookup 7 hops from ground truth lookup DR-174
In RuleSpeak

An individual prediction's individual progression state key is the nephritis progression state key of the individual prediction's individual.

In English

The nephritis progression state key of the linked individual.

As a formula
= INDEX(Nephritis Progression State Key, MATCH(Individual, Individual ID, 0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
ƒNephritis Progression State KeyIndividuals If max progression state order is at least 5 then "BiopsyIndicated", otherwise if max progression state order is at least 4 then "RenalFlareRisk", otherwise if max progression state order is at least 3 then "EarlyNephritis", otherwise if max progression state order is at least 2 then "SerologicActive", otherwise "PresymptomaticAutoimmunity". ●IndividualIndividualPredictions Individual predicted. ●Individual IDIndividuals Stable identifier for each individual in the million-person cohort.
Consumers 2 direct rules that read this one
ƒ Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions ƒ Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 10 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations ⇢ Individual SerologyObservations ● Individual ID Individuals ● Individual IndividualPredictions

Lookup: the individual's derived disease state.

↗ Individual is Disease Progressing Lookup 8 hops from ground truth boolean DR-175
In RuleSpeak

An individual prediction's individual is disease progressing is true when the individual prediction's individual is disease progressing.

In English

The is disease progressing of the linked individual.

As a formula
= INDEX(Is Disease Progressing, MATCH(Individual, Individual ID, 0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
ƒIs Disease ProgressingIndividuals If nephritis progression state key is "EarlyNephritis", nephritis progression state key is "RenalFlareRisk", or nephritis progression state key is "BiopsyIndicated" then true(), otherwise false(). ●IndividualIndividualPredictions Individual predicted. ●Individual IDIndividuals Stable identifier for each individual in the million-person cohort.
Consumers 1 direct rules that read this one
ƒ Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 10 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations ⇢ Individual SerologyObservations ● Individual ID Individuals ● Individual IndividualPredictions

Lookup: is the individual's disease progressing (simulator).

ƒ Recommended Treatment Line Calculated 11 hops from ground truth string DR-176
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's recommended treatment line is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “No targeted line — mechanism unconfirmed” if it is not the case that the rests on confirmed mechanism flag is set
  2. the literal “Mycophenolate (induction)” if any of these hold:
    • the individual progression state key is the literal “RenalFlareRisk”
    • the individual progression state key is the literal “BiopsyIndicated”
  3. the literal “Anifrolumab” if the individual target pathway is the literal “type-I-IFN”
  4. the literal “Belimumab” if the individual target pathway is the literal “B-cell/autoantibody”
  5. the literal “Secukinumab” if the individual target pathway is the literal “IL-17/23”
  6. the literal “Standard-of-care (no mechanism-matched targeted line)” otherwise
In English

If not rests on confirmed mechanism then "No targeted line — mechanism unconfirmed", otherwise if individual progression state key is "RenalFlareRisk" or individual progression state key is "BiopsyIndicated" then "Mycophenolate (induction)", otherwise if individual target pathway is "type-I-IFN" then "Anifrolumab", otherwise if individual target pathway is "B-cell/autoantibody" then "Belimumab", otherwise if individual target pathway is "IL-17/23" then "Secukinumab", otherwise "Standard-of-care (no mechanism-matched targeted line)".

As a formula
= IF(NOT(Rests on Confirmed Mechanism),"No targeted line — mechanism unconfirmed",IF(OR(Individual Progression State Key="RenalFlareRisk",Individual Progression State Key="BiopsyIndicated"),"Mycophenolate (induction)",IF(Individual Target Pathway="type-I-IFN","Anifrolumab",IF(Individual Target Pathway="B-cell/autoantibody","Belimumab",IF(Individual Target Pathway="IL-17/23","Secukinumab","Standard-of-care (no mechanism-matched targeted line)")))))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
ƒRests on Confirmed MechanismIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false(). ↗Individual Progression State KeyIndividualPredictions The nephritis progression state key of the linked individual. ↗Individual Target PathwayIndividualPredictions The target pathway of the linked individual.
Ground truth at the leaves 39 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Individual ID Individuals ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations ⇢ Individual SerologyObservations ● Target Pathway CausalMechanisms

DERIVED treatment-line recommendation from confirmed-mechanism TargetPathway + disease state. The audit's MMF/belimumab/anifrolumab example.

ƒ Treatment Line Deciding Factor Calculated 11 hops from ground truth string DR-177
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's treatment line deciding factor is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “MechanismUnconfirmed” if it is not the case that the rests on confirmed mechanism flag is set
  2. the literal “ActiveNephritis-Induction” if any of these hold:
    • the individual progression state key is the literal “RenalFlareRisk”
    • the individual progression state key is the literal “BiopsyIndicated”
  3. the literal “IFNSignature-Anifrolumab” if the individual target pathway is the literal “type-I-IFN”
  4. the literal “AutoantibodyDriven-Belimumab” if the individual target pathway is the literal “B-cell/autoantibody”
  5. the literal “IL17Axis-Secukinumab” if the individual target pathway is the literal “IL-17/23”
  6. the literal “NoMechanismMatch” otherwise
In English

If not rests on confirmed mechanism then "MechanismUnconfirmed", otherwise if individual progression state key is "RenalFlareRisk" or individual progression state key is "BiopsyIndicated" then "ActiveNephritis-Induction", otherwise if individual target pathway is "type-I-IFN" then "IFNSignature-Anifrolumab", otherwise if individual target pathway is "B-cell/autoantibody" then "AutoantibodyDriven-Belimumab", otherwise if individual target pathway is "IL-17/23" then "IL17Axis-Secukinumab", otherwise "NoMechanismMatch".

As a formula
= IF(NOT(Rests on Confirmed Mechanism),"MechanismUnconfirmed",IF(OR(Individual Progression State Key="RenalFlareRisk",Individual Progression State Key="BiopsyIndicated"),"ActiveNephritis-Induction",IF(Individual Target Pathway="type-I-IFN","IFNSignature-Anifrolumab",IF(Individual Target Pathway="B-cell/autoantibody","AutoantibodyDriven-Belimumab",IF(Individual Target Pathway="IL-17/23","IL17Axis-Secukinumab","NoMechanismMatch")))))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
ƒRests on Confirmed MechanismIndividualPredictions If individual confirmed node count is at least 1 then true(), otherwise false(). ↗Individual Progression State KeyIndividualPredictions The nephritis progression state key of the linked individual. ↗Individual Target PathwayIndividualPredictions The target pathway of the linked individual.
Ground truth at the leaves 39 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Individual ID Individuals ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations ⇢ Individual SerologyObservations ● Target Pathway CausalMechanisms

The single deciding reason for the recommended line (mirrors DecidingGate style).

ƒ Progression Vs Actionability Disagree Calculated 15 hops from ground truth boolean DR-178
In RuleSpeak

The individual prediction's progression vs actionability disagree is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if all of these hold:
    • the individual is disease progressing flag is set
    • it is not the case that the is clinically actionable flag is set
  2. false otherwise
In English

If individual is disease progressing and not is clinically actionable then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(AND(Individual is Disease Progressing,NOT(Is Clinically Actionable)),TRUE(),FALSE())
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
↗Individual is Disease ProgressingIndividualPredictions The is disease progressing of the linked individual. ƒIs Clinically ActionableIndividualPredictions If is high confidence prediction, is falsifiability backed, is ancestry transport safe, and predicted value is greater than 0 then true(), otherwise false().
Ground truth at the leaves 47 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations ⇢ Individual SerologyObservations ● Individual ID Individuals ● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual Prediction CalibrationBins ● Individual Prediction ID IndividualPredictions ● Predicted Probability Band CalibrationBins ● Observed Event Rate CalibrationBins ● Coverage Count CalibrationBins ● Individual CausalMechanisms ● Causal Mechanism EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism ID CausalMechanisms ● Measurement Error Score OmicsAssays ● Omics Assay EvidenceItems ● Omics Assay ID OmicsAssays ● Is Negative Control Arm EvidenceItems ● Standard Error EvidenceItems ● Effect Size EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Ancestry P Cs EvidenceItems ● Is Adjusted for Batch EvidenceItems ● Is Cross Modality EvidenceItems ● Causal Mechanism CohortReplications ● Replication P Value CohortReplications ● Replication Effect Sign CohortReplications ● Causal Mechanism NegativeControlTests ● Permutation Effect Size NegativeControlTests ● Null Threshold NegativeControlTests ● Causal Mechanism InterventionTargets ● Has Pleiotropy CausalMechanisms ● Genomic Variant CausalMechanisms ● Allele Frequency GenomicVariants ● Is Rare Variant Class VariantTypes ● Variant Type GenomicVariants ● Variant Type ID VariantTypes ● Has Allele Specific Expression GenomicVariants ● Genomic Variant ID GenomicVariants ● Environmental Exposure CausalMechanisms ● Has Cryptic Relatedness Flag Individuals ● Is Ancestry Absent From Training Individuals ● Replication Ancestry Label CohortReplications ● Ancestry Label Individuals

THE COUNTER-EXAMPLE FLAG: TRUE when disease is progressing (simulator) but the prediction is NOT clinically actionable (gate). Proves the two layers are independent.

Calibration Bin

Per-prediction reliability-curve bins, seeded from the held-out coverage of this individual's own ancestry x disease. Calibration is an aggregation over these rows.

● Bin Label Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Human label.

● Individual Prediction Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

FK to the prediction this bin calibrates.

● Predicted Probability Band Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

OBSERVATION: predicted-probability midpoint of this bin (0-1).

● Observed Event Rate Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

OBSERVATION: empirical event rate among held-out cases in this band, matched to this individual's ancestry x disease.

● Coverage Count Ground truth integer

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype integer); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

OBSERVATION: number of held-out outcomes in this band for this ancestry x disease.

ƒ Name Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-179
In RuleSpeak

A calibration bin's name is computed as the bin label.

In English

Bin label.

As a formula
= Bin Label
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Bin LabelCalibrationBins Human label.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Bin Label CalibrationBins

Display name.

↗ Parent Path Lookup 5 hops from ground truth string DR-180
In RuleSpeak

A calibration bin's parent path is the relative path of the calibration bin's individual prediction.

In English

The relative path of the linked individual prediction.

As a formula
= INDEX(Relative Path, MATCH(Individual Prediction, Individual Prediction ID, 0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
ƒRelative PathIndividualPredictions (parent path joined with "/predictions/") joined with individual prediction id. ●Individual PredictionCalibrationBins FK to the prediction this bin calibrates. ●Individual Prediction IDIndividualPredictions Stable identifier for each prediction record.
Consumers 1 direct rules that read this one
ƒ Relative Path CalibrationBins
Ground truth at the leaves 6 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Family Name Individuals ● Given Name Individuals ● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual ID Individuals ● Individual Prediction ID IndividualPredictions ● Individual Prediction CalibrationBins

Lookup: IndividualPredictions.RelativePath via IndividualPrediction — used to chain this entity's path under its parent.

ƒ Relative Path Calculated 6 hops from ground truth string DR-181
In RuleSpeak

A calibration bin's relative path is computed as the parent path, followed by the literal “/bins/”, followed by the calibration bin ID.

In English

(parent path joined with "/bins/") joined with calibration bin id.

As a formula
= Parent Path & "/bins/" & Calibration Bin ID
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
↗Parent PathCalibrationBins The relative path of the linked individual prediction. ●Calibration Bin IDCalibrationBins Stable id for this bin.
Ground truth at the leaves 7 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Family Name Individuals ● Given Name Individuals ● Individual IndividualPredictions ● Individual ID Individuals ● Individual Prediction ID IndividualPredictions ● Individual Prediction CalibrationBins ● Calibration Bin ID CalibrationBins

Path to this CalibrationBin page, chained under its IndividualPrediction parent.

ƒ Bin Abs Error Calculated 1 hop from ground truth number DR-182
In RuleSpeak

The calibration bin's bin abs error is determined by the following priority:

  1. the predicted probability band minus the observed event rate if the predicted probability band is at least the observed event rate
  2. the observed event rate minus the predicted probability band otherwise
In English

If predicted probability band is at least observed event rate then (predicted probability band minus observed event rate), otherwise (observed event rate minus predicted probability band).

As a formula
= IF(Predicted Probability Band >= Observed Event Rate, Predicted Probability Band - Observed Event Rate, Observed Event Rate - Predicted Probability Band)
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
●Predicted Probability BandCalibrationBins OBSERVATION: predicted-probability midpoint of this bin (0-1). ●Observed Event RateCalibrationBins OBSERVATION: empirical event rate among held-out cases in this band, matched to this individual's ancestry x disease.
Consumers 2 direct +9 transitive rules that read this one
Σ Sum Bin Abs Error IndividualPredictions ƒ Is Well Calibrated Bin CalibrationBins Mean Bin Abs Error IndividualPredictions Count Well Calibrated Bins IndividualPredictions Calibrated Uncertainty IndividualPredictions Well Calibrated Fraction IndividualPredictions Is High Confidence Prediction IndividualPredictions Lifecycle State Key IndividualPredictions Deciding Gate IndividualPredictions Is Clinically Actionable IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 2 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Predicted Probability Band CalibrationBins ● Observed Event Rate CalibrationBins

Derived: absolute gap between predicted band and observed rate.

ƒ Is Well Calibrated Bin Calculated 2 hops from ground truth boolean DR-183
In RuleSpeak

The calibration bin's is well calibrated bin is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if all of these hold:
    • the coverage count is at least 20
    • the bin abs error is at most 0.1
  2. false otherwise
In English

If coverage count is at least 20 and bin abs error is at most 0.1 then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(AND(Coverage Count >= 20, Bin Abs Error <= 0.1), TRUE(), FALSE())
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
●Coverage CountCalibrationBins OBSERVATION: number of held-out outcomes in this band for this ancestry x disease. ƒBin Abs ErrorCalibrationBins If predicted probability band is at least observed event rate then (predicted probability band minus observed event rate), otherwise (observed event rate minus predicted probability band).
Consumers 1 direct +7 transitive rules that read this one
Σ Count Well Calibrated Bins IndividualPredictions Well Calibrated Fraction IndividualPredictions Calibrated Uncertainty IndividualPredictions Is High Confidence Prediction IndividualPredictions Lifecycle State Key IndividualPredictions Deciding Gate IndividualPredictions Is Clinically Actionable IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 3 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Coverage Count CalibrationBins ● Predicted Probability Band CalibrationBins ● Observed Event Rate CalibrationBins

Derived: enough held-out coverage AND small reliability gap.

● Source Quote Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

PANEL 2->1 provenance pointer (raw leaf, read by nothing downstream): the literal span of the patient's CaseNarrative from which this calibration bin's raw value was extracted. A human verifies the EXTRACTION was faithful here, separately from trusting the derived diagnosis — which is exactly what defeats 'a hallucination laundered through a deterministic function'.

Intervention Target

Validated intervention targets for gene-based and cell-based therapies derived from falsifiable causal mechanisms.

● Target Label Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Target name (gene, pathway, cell type).

● Causal Mechanism Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Parent causal mechanism.

● Autoimmune Disease Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Target autoimmune disease.

● Therapy Class Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Gene-based, Cell-based, or Environmental.

● Is Validated Ground truth boolean

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype boolean); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

True when target is validated for clinical trials.

  1. true if the therapy class is the literal “Gene-based”
  2. false otherwise

= IF(Therapy Class = "Gene-based", TRUE(), FALSE())

Axiom

Non-negotiable invariants the platform must obey. Load-bearing constraints, not per-loop work. Captured from the gauntlet conversation.

● Statement Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

The invariant, stated as a rule.

● Rationale Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Why this must hold / what it defends against.

● Category Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Grouping: trust-boundary | solve-by-inference | knob | witness | scope | report-derivation.

Tests for Success

Falsifiable conditions that prove the axioms hold. The human-readable index of what each demonstration shows; many are realized in the witnessed harness.

● Claim Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

The success condition, stated falsifiably.

● How Witnessed Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

How a human/expert confirms it without trusting the code.

● Related Harness File Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Harness file that realizes it, if any.

● Status Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

red | green | planned.

Feature

Catalog of buildable capabilities the platform has / allows for. Coarser grain than loops. Each row carries challenge provenance (ChallengeRefs: exact quoted text + file/line/col into THE-ORIGINAL-CHALLENGE.md, for UI hover tips), a Category, a Priority, and a free-form Markdown ChallengeNotes comment. Source of truth for the DERIVED PLATFORM_FEATURES.md. AssignedLoop links a feature to the loop that delivers it (nullable until scheduled).

● Title Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Short feature name.

● Category Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Which layer of the platform this belongs to (Keystone / inference DAG, Leaf / LLM surface, Witness / harness, Disease-state simulation, Treatment reasoning, Corpus-level discovery, Reporting, Platform infrastructure).

● Priority Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Load-bearing | Supporting | Roadmap.

● Description Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

What the capability does (factual, not a pitch).

● Challenge Refs Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

JSON array of provenance pointers into THE-ORIGINAL-CHALLENGE.md. Each: {file,line,col,len,quote,section,relation}. col is the 0-based char offset within the line; len is the quote length; section is prompt|payoff|audit|response; relation is direct|indirect. Drives UI hover tips that highlight the exact span.

● Challenge Refs Rendered Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Pre-flattened Markdown bullet list of ChallengeRefs, so the dumb hbars template can print it verbatim (the engine has no loop-over-JSON helper).

● Challenge Notes Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Free-form Markdown comment: which challenge elements this relates to (directly or indirectly) and how it is load-bearing or illustrative.

● Ref Count Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Number of challenge refs (carried as raw for display; the hbars engine can't count a JSON string).

● Assigned Loop Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

FK -> LeopoldLoops.LeopoldLoopId; empty if unscheduled.

ƒ Name Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-194
In RuleSpeak

A feature's name is computed as the title.

In English

Title.

As a formula
= Title
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●TitleFeatures Short feature name.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Title Features

Display label.

ƒ Relative Path Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-195
In RuleSpeak

A feature's relative path is computed as the literal “/admin/features/”, followed by the feature ID.

In English

"/admin/features/" joined with feature id.

As a formula
= "/admin/features/" & Feature ID
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Feature IDFeatures Stable identifier.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Feature ID Features

Path to this Features entry: /admin/features/<id>.

ƒ Meta Line Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-196
In RuleSpeak

A feature's meta line is computed as the literal “**Category:** ”, followed by the category, followed by the literal “ - **Priority:** ”, followed by the priority, followed by the literal “ - **Challenge refs:** ”, followed by the ref count.

In English

(((("**Category:** " joined with category) joined with " - **Priority:** ") joined with priority) joined with " - **Challenge refs:** ") joined with ref count.

As a formula
= "**Category:** " & Category & " - **Priority:** " & Priority & " - **Challenge refs:** " & Ref Count
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
●CategoryFeatures Which layer of the platform this belongs to (Keystone / inference DAG, Leaf / LLM surface, Witness / harness, Disease-state simulation, Treatment reasoning, Corpus-level discovery, Reporting, Platform infrastructure). ●PriorityFeatures Load-bearing | Supporting | Roadmap. ●Ref CountFeatures Number of challenge refs (carried as raw for display; the hbars engine can't count a JSON string).
Ground truth at the leaves 3 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Category Features ● Priority Features ● Ref Count Features

One-line meta summary for the catalog (category - priority - ref count).

Inference Kind

Families of derivation the platform performs - the KINDS of inference in the DAG (lookups, aggregations, higher-order gates, state machines, transitive closure, predicate-gated narrative, cross-substrate conformance), independent of any one feature. Lets PLATFORM_FEATURES.md open with a short overview of the reasoning machinery before the per-feature catalog. Grounded in field types that actually exist in this rulebook; Maturity is Live unless an upstream step is still in flight.

● Title Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Short name of the inference family.

● Description Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

One-line factual description of the kind.

● Example Field Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

A concrete field in the model that realizes this kind.

● Evidence Count Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

How much of it exists (field counts / usage), for honest weight.

● Maturity Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Live | Partial (Partial = an upstream step is still in flight).

● Sort Order Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Display order in the overview.

Title.

= Title
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads

Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Title InferenceKinds

Open Question

Decisions still pending, captured so they are not silently re-litigated in a later session.

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

The decision, once made.

TRUE when decided.

Non Goal

Leopold Loop

The ordered Leopold loops that build this platform, as data. The derived plan (LEOPOLD_LOOPs.md, via json-hbars-transform) is generated from these rows; completed ([DONE]) loops are pruned at publish so only current/roadmap work shows in the plan.

● Loop Number Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Display number (0, 0.5, 1...).

● Title Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Loop title.

● Goal Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

The one coherent rule-change / outcome.

● Status Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

done | next | planned | backlog (the raw input that drives Completedness).

● Rule Commit Msg Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

The rule commit message (or "none — app-only loop").

● State Commit Msg Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

The state commit message.

● Sort Order Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Ordering within the plan.

ƒ Name Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-205
In RuleSpeak

A leopold loop's name is computed as the literal “Loop ”, followed by the loop number, followed by the literal “ — ”, followed by the title.

In English

"Loop ", loop number, " — ", joined with title.

As a formula
= CONCATENATE("Loop ", Loop Number, " — ", Title)
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
●Loop NumberLeopoldLoops Display number (0, 0.5, 1...). ●TitleLeopoldLoops Loop title.
Ground truth at the leaves 2 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Loop Number LeopoldLoops ● Title LeopoldLoops

Display label.

Inputs 1 fields this rule reads

Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on

ƒ Completedness Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-207
In RuleSpeak

A leopold loop's completedness is computed as the status.

In English

Status.

As a formula
= Status
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●StatusLeopoldLoops done | next | planned | backlog (the raw input that drives Completedness).
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Status LeopoldLoops

Normalized status used by the derived plan to decide placement.

ƒ Is in Current Plan Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-208
In RuleSpeak

The leopold loop's is in current plan is determined by the following priority:

  1. the FALSE if the status is the literal “done”
  2. the TRUE otherwise
In English

True when not status is "done".

As a formula
= IF(Status = "done", FALSE, TRUE)
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●StatusLeopoldLoops done | next | planned | backlog (the raw input that drives Completedness).
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Status LeopoldLoops

TRUE for the current "next" loop and anything still planned/backlog (not done).

● Status Badge Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Display badge for the derived plan, e.g. [DONE] / [NEXT] / [PLANNED] / [BACKLOG].

● Status Line Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Extra plan line: commit messages for done/next loops; empty otherwise.

Routing and Navigation

Role-based navigation: open-ended parent->child->leaf routes with computed paths. Each route has a template (/intake/case/:caseId); entities carry RelativePath that substitutes their own id/slug. Roles: admin, intake-clinician, diagnosing-doctor, external-llm.

ƒ Name Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-209
In RuleSpeak ⚠︎ mechanical

A routing and navigation's name is computed as the lower-cased display name with every a space replaced by a hyphen.

In English

Display name lowercased with “ ” replaced by “-”.

As a formula
= SUBSTITUTE(LOWER(Display Name), " ", "-")
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Display NameRoutingAndNavigation Human-readable nav label.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Display Name RoutingAndNavigation

Slug of the display name.

● Display Name Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Human-readable nav label.

● Route Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

URL template, role/workflow-prefixed with :params, e.g. /intake/case/:caseId.

● Description Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

What this route shows.

● Sort Order Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Display order within its nav level.

● Parent Route Key Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

RouteKey of the parent nav node (empty for top-level). Self-referential recursion.

● Route Key Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Stable dot-delimited slug, e.g. diagnosis.case.mechanism.

● Nav Level Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Hierarchy level: top / sub / leaf.

● Role Visibility Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

CSV of roles that can see this nav item: admin,intake-clinician,diagnosing-doctor,external-llm.

● Primary Table Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Backing table name.

● Primary View Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Backing vw_* view.

● Icon Hint Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Optional icon name for the UI.

● Is Dynamic Ground truth boolean

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype boolean); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

True if the route template contains :params.

● Pin to Top Ground truth boolean

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype boolean); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Pin to the top of its nav level, before SortOrder.

● Admin CRUD Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Admin CRUD grant for this route (contains C/R/U/D). Empty = no access.

● Intake Clinician CRUD Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

IntakeClinician CRUD grant for this route (contains C/R/U/D). Empty = no access.

● Diagnosing Doctor CRUD Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

DiagnosingDoctor CRUD grant for this route (contains C/R/U/D). Empty = no access.

● External Llm CRUD Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

ExternalLlm CRUD grant for this route (contains C/R/U/D). Empty = no access.

ƒ Admin Can Create Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-210
In RuleSpeak

The routing and navigation's admin can create is determined by the following priority:

  1. no value if the admin CRUD is blank
  2. the admin CRUD mentions the literal “C” otherwise
In English

If admin crud equals blank() then blank(), otherwise not find("C", admin crud) has an error.

As a formula
= IF(Admin CRUD=BLANK(),BLANK(),NOT(ISERROR(FIND("C",Admin CRUD))))
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Admin CRUDRoutingAndNavigation Admin CRUD grant for this route (contains C/R/U/D). Empty = no access.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Admin CRUD RoutingAndNavigation

Derived: AdminCRUD contains 'C'.

ƒ Admin Can Read Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-211

  1. no value if the admin CRUD is blank
  2. the admin CRUD mentions the literal “R” otherwise

If admin crud equals blank() then blank(), otherwise not find("R", admin crud) has an error.

As a formula
= IF(Admin CRUD=BLANK(),BLANK(),NOT(ISERROR(FIND("R",Admin CRUD))))

Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Intake Clinician CRUD RoutingAndNavigation

Derived: IntakeClinicianCRUD contains 'U'.

ƒ Intake Clinician Can Delete Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-217
In RuleSpeak

The routing and navigation's intake clinician can delete is determined by the following priority:

  1. no value if the intake clinician CRUD is blank
  2. the intake clinician CRUD mentions the literal “D” otherwise
In English

If intake clinician crud equals blank() then blank(), otherwise not find("D", intake clinician crud) has an error.

As a formula
= IF(Intake Clinician CRUD=BLANK(),BLANK(),NOT(ISERROR(FIND("D",Intake Clinician CRUD))))
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads

Derived: IntakeClinicianCRUD contains 'D'.

ƒ Depth Calculated 1 hop from ground truth integer DR-226
In RuleSpeak ⚠︎ mechanical

The routing and navigation's depth is determined by the following priority:

  1. 0 if the parent route key is blank
  2. the length of the route key minus the length of the route key with every a period replaced by an empty string otherwise
In English

If parent route key equals blank() then 0, otherwise (the length of route key minus the length of route key with “.” replaced by “”).

As a formula
= IF(Parent Route Key=BLANK(), 0, LEN(Route Key) - LEN(SUBSTITUTE(Route Key, ".", "")))
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
●Parent Route KeyRoutingAndNavigation RouteKey of the parent nav node (empty for top-level). Self-referential recursion. ●Route KeyRoutingAndNavigation Stable dot-delimited slug, e.g. diagnosis.case.mechanism.
Ground truth at the leaves 2 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Parent Route Key RoutingAndNavigation ● Route Key RoutingAndNavigation

Nesting depth: 0 = top-level; otherwise number of dot-segments in RouteKey.

ƒ Full Path Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-227
In RuleSpeak

A routing and navigation's full path is computed as the route.

In English

Route.

As a formula
= Route
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●RouteRoutingAndNavigation URL template, role/workflow-prefixed with :params, e.g. /intake/case/:caseId.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Route RoutingAndNavigation

Canonical role-agnostic URL path (equals Route).

ƒ Handler Base Name Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-228
In RuleSpeak ⚠︎ mechanical

A routing and navigation's handler base name is computed as the route key with every a period replaced by a space with every a hyphen replaced by a space.

In English

Route key with “.” replaced by “ ” with “-” replaced by “ ”.

As a formula
= SUBSTITUTE(SUBSTITUTE(Route Key, ".", " "), "-", " ")
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Route KeyRoutingAndNavigation Stable dot-delimited slug, e.g. diagnosis.case.mechanism.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Route Key RoutingAndNavigation

Space-delimited form of RouteKey; client PascalCases + prefixes role to derive a handler component.

ƒ Relative Path Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-229

In English

"/admin/routing/" joined with routing and navigation id.

As a formula
= "/admin/routing/" & Routing and Navigation ID
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Routing and Navigation IDRoutingAndNavigation Slug PK for this nav node, e.g. nav-intake-case.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Routing and Navigation ID RoutingAndNavigation

Path to this routing node's own admin page.

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

⇢ Machine States Relationship string

A pointer to Machine State. It is not derived from anything else — it is the link the rest of the DAG hangs off.

Reverse: instance transition log rows.

⇢State MachineMachineStates FK -> StateMachines.StateMachineId. ●State Machine IDStateMachines Slug PK, e.g. diagnosis-lifecycle.

Σ Reachable State Count Aggregation 1 hop from ground truth integer DR-234
In RuleSpeak

A machine state's reachable state count is the number of vw state transition rules closure related to the machine state.

In English

Count of vw_state_transition_rules_closure whose from id is machine state id.

As a formula
= COUNTIFS(From ID, Machine State ID)
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Machine State IDMachineStates Slug PK, e.g. diagnosis-lifecycle--intake.
Consumers 1 direct rules that read this one
↗ Reachable States Ahead Individuals
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Machine State ID MachineStates

Number of states reachable FROM this state via the transitive closure of the transition edges (rollup over vw_state_transition_rules_closure where from_id = this state). This is a graph-reachability fact the linear severity rank CANNOT reproduce: both Quiescent (the remission sink) and BiopsyIndicated (the terminal progression state) have 0 reachable-ahead, though they sit at opposite ends of the order — the count is non-monotonic in OrderIndex because the machine BRANCHES (remission). The closure is load-bearing here: delete it and this field is uncomputable.

State Transition Rule

In RuleSpeak

A state transition rule's from state key is the state key of the state transition rule's from state.

The state key of the linked from state.

As a formula
= INDEX(State Key, MATCH(From State, Machine State ID, 0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
●State KeyMachineStates Bare value as stored/derived in the subject's current-state column. ⇢From StateStateTransitionRules FK -> MachineStates.MachineStateId. ●Machine State IDMachineStates Slug PK, e.g. diagnosis-lifecycle--intake.

ƒ Is Forward Edge StateTransitionRules
Ground truth at the leaves 3 the raw values this ultimately depends on
