ƒ Is Forward Edge Calculated 2 hops from ground truth boolean DR-238
In RuleSpeak

A state transition rule is considered a forward edge if it is not the case that the to state key is the from state key.

In English

Not to state key equals from state key.

As a formula
= NOT(To State Key=From State Key)
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
↗To State KeyStateTransitionRules The state key of the linked to state. ↗From State KeyStateTransitionRules The state key of the linked from state.
Ground truth at the leaves 4 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● State Key MachineStates ⇢ To State StateTransitionRules ● Machine State ID MachineStates ⇢ From State StateTransitionRules

TRUE when the edge advances to a different state (all edges here).

● Progression Closure Ground truth string
In RuleSpeak

A state transition rule's progression closure is a defined attribute of the state transition rule.

In English

This roll-up is defined structurally over a relationship — no spreadsheet formula to read aloud. See RuleSpeak.

As a formula

No spreadsheet formula — a structural roll-up. See RuleSpeak.

Transitive closure of state-machine transitions (an owl:TransitiveProperty). The asserted FromState->ToState edges imply the full reachability ordering of each machine - including never-asserted long-range pairs such as PresymptomaticAutoimmunity -> BiopsyIndicated. Materialized by the transpiler as the cycle-safe recursive view vw_state_transition_rules_closure(from_id, to_id, hop_distance, is_inferred): asserted edges (hop 1) plus inferred reachability rows. The disease trajectory is derived from the transition topology, not hand-asserted.

State Transition

Instance-level transition log (the witnessed history).

● Modified by Model Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Audit: AI model credited on last save, if any.

Subject State Instance

Per-subject state occupancy records; current state has blank ExitedAt.

ƒ Relative Path Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-241
In RuleSpeak

A subject state instance's relative path is computed as the literal “/admin/state-machine/instances/”, followed by the subject state instance ID.

In English

"/admin/state-machine/instances/" joined with subject state instance id.

As a formula
= "/admin/state-machine/instances/" & Subject State Instance ID
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Subject State Instance IDSubjectStateInstances PK: ssi-{subject-id}-{state-key}-{seq}.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Subject State Instance ID SubjectStateInstances

Path to this occupancy record.

⇢ State Machine Relationship string

A pointer to State Machine. It is not derived from anything else — it is the link the rest of the DAG hangs off.

FK -> StateMachines.StateMachineId.

● Subject Table Name Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Polymorphic table name.

● State Key Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

The machine state entered by this occupancy record.

● Entered At Ground truth datetime

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype datetime); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Timestamp when this state was entered.

● Exited At Ground truth datetime

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype datetime); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Timestamp when the subject left this state. NULL while current.

● Sequence Index Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

1-based position on this subject's path through the machine.

⇢ Prior Instance Relationship string

A pointer to Subject State Instance. It is not derived from anything else — it is the link the rest of the DAG hangs off.

Self-FK: previous occupancy in this subject's chain. NULL for initial.

⇢ Entered Via Transition Relationship string

A pointer to State Transition. It is not derived from anything else — it is the link the rest of the DAG hangs off.

FK -> StateTransitions: the edge event that created this occupancy.

ƒ Is Current Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-242
In RuleSpeak

A subject state instance is considered a current if the exited at is blank.

In English

Exited at is blank.

As a formula
= ISBLANK(Exited At)
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Exited AtSubjectStateInstances Timestamp when the subject left this state. NULL while current.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Exited At SubjectStateInstances

TRUE when ExitedAt IS NULL — the subject's active state.

ƒ Has Complete Lineage Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-243
In RuleSpeak

A subject state instance is considered to have a complete lineage if the sequence index is at least 1.

In English

Sequence index is at least 1.

As a formula
= Sequence Index>=1
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Sequence IndexSubjectStateInstances 1-based position on this subject's path through the machine.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Sequence Index SubjectStateInstances

TRUE when lineage walks back to SequenceIndex 1.

● Created At Ground truth datetime

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype datetime); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Audit: when first inserted.

● Created by Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Audit: owner who created it.

● Modified At Ground truth datetime

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype datetime); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Audit: when last written.

● Modified by Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Audit: who last wrote it.

● Modified by Model Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Audit: AI model credited on last save, if any.

● Dwell Days Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Bitemporal dwell: days the subject occupied this state (transparent raw value; transpiler lacks date-diff). Witnessed + editable, like any leaf.

ƒ Is Long Dwell Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-244
In RuleSpeak

The subject state instance's is long dwell is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if the dwell days is at least 90
  2. false otherwise
In English

If dwell days is at least 90 then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(Dwell Days>=90,TRUE(),FALSE())
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Dwell DaysSubjectStateInstances Bitemporal dwell: days the subject occupied this state (transparent raw value; transpiler lacks date-diff). Witnessed + editable, like any leaf.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Dwell Days SubjectStateInstances

TRUE when DwellDays >= 90 (a season).

Disease Domain Concept

v2 vocabulary completeness: every disease-domain concept the v1 audit named, with its modeling status and the challenge-stressor TYPE it instantiates. Makes the coverage claim checkable by grep, not by trust.

● Concept Label Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Human-readable concept name (the audit's missing word).

● Related Disease Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Disease this concept belongs to (SLE/RA/PsA/* for cross-cutting). Convention string, not a FK.

● Modeling Status Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

deep-dag | schema | vocabulary — how deeply v2 models this concept.

● Definition Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

What the concept is and how v2 represents it.

● Challenge Stressor Type Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Which TYPE of original-challenge stressor this concept instantiates (for the reconcile map).

ƒ Name Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-245
In RuleSpeak

A disease domain concept's name is computed as the concept label.

In English

Concept label.

As a formula
= Concept Label
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Concept LabelDiseaseDomainConcepts Human-readable concept name (the audit's missing word).
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Concept Label DiseaseDomainConcepts

Echoes ConceptLabel.

ƒ Relative Path Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-246
In RuleSpeak

A disease domain concept's relative path is computed as the literal “/admin/disease-concepts/”, followed by the disease domain concept ID.

In English

"/admin/disease-concepts/" joined with disease domain concept id.

As a formula
= "/admin/disease-concepts/" & Disease Domain Concept ID
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Disease Domain Concept IDDiseaseDomainConcepts Slug PK.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Disease Domain Concept ID DiseaseDomainConcepts

Path to this concept's page.

ƒ Is Deeply Modeled Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-247
In RuleSpeak

The disease domain concept's is deeply modeled is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if the modeling status is the literal “deep-dag”
  2. false otherwise
In English

If modeling status is "deep-dag" then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(Modeling Status="deep-dag", TRUE(), FALSE())
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Modeling StatusDiseaseDomainConcepts deep-dag | schema | vocabulary — how deeply v2 models this concept.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Modeling Status DiseaseDomainConcepts

TRUE when this concept carries a witnessed inference DAG (status = deep-dag).

ƒ Is Schema Modeled Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-248
In RuleSpeak

The disease domain concept's is schema modeled is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if any of these hold:
    • the modeling status is the literal “deep-dag”
    • the modeling status is the literal “schema”
  2. false otherwise
In English

If modeling status is "deep-dag" or modeling status is "schema" then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(OR(Modeling Status="deep-dag",Modeling Status="schema"), TRUE(), FALSE())
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Modeling StatusDiseaseDomainConcepts deep-dag | schema | vocabulary — how deeply v2 models this concept.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Modeling Status DiseaseDomainConcepts

TRUE when first-class schema/data (deep-dag or schema).

Serology Observation

RAW longitudinal serology panels (the lab/LLM layer) + derived trend, SLEDAI sub-scores, and the disease state IMPLIED by each panel. The leaves that drive the lupus-nephritis progression machine.

⇢ Individual Relationship string

A pointer to Individual. It is not derived from anything else — it is the link the rest of the DAG hangs off.

FK -> Individuals.IndividualId.

● Observed At Ground truth datetime

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype datetime); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Valid-time of this serology panel (RAW leaf).

● Sequence Index Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

1-based order within the individual's panel series (RAW).

● Anti Ds Dna IU Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

anti-dsDNA titre IU/mL (RAW lab).

● Complement C3 Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

C3 mg/dL (RAW lab).

● Complement C4 Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

C4 mg/dL (RAW lab).

● Proteinuria G Per Day Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

urine protein g/day (RAW lab).

● Egfr Ml Min Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

eGFR mL/min (RAW lab).

● Has Active Urinary Sediment Ground truth boolean

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype boolean); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

active casts/hematuria (RAW observation).

⇢ Prior Observation Relationship string

A pointer to Serology Observation. It is not derived from anything else — it is the link the rest of the DAG hangs off.

Self-FK -> the prior panel in this individual's series (seq-1). NULL for the first.

↗ Prior Anti Ds Dna IU Lookup 1 hop from ground truth number DR-249
In RuleSpeak

A serology observation's prior anti ds dna IU is the anti ds dna IU of the serology observation's prior observation.

In English

The anti ds dna iu of the linked prior observation.

As a formula
= INDEX(Anti Ds Dna IU, MATCH(Prior Observation, Serology Observation ID, 0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
●Anti Ds Dna IUSerologyObservations anti-dsDNA titre IU/mL (RAW lab). ⇢Prior ObservationSerologyObservations Self-FK -> the prior panel in this individual's series (seq-1). NULL for the first. ●Serology Observation IDSerologyObservations Slug PK: sero-{ind}-{seq}.
Consumers 1 direct +21 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Anti Ds Dna Trend SerologyObservations Is Pre Nephritic Signature Panel SerologyObservations Sledai Serology Points SerologyObservations Progression State Key SerologyObservations Count Pre Nephritic Signature Panels Individuals Sledai Score SerologyObservations Progression State Order SerologyObservations Is in Pre Nephritic Signature Cluster Individuals Signature Strength Individuals Latest Sledai Score Individuals Max Progression State Order Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals Nephritis Progression State Key Individuals Is Disease Progressing Individuals Current Progression State ID Individuals Individual Progression State Key IndividualPredictions Individual is Disease Progressing IndividualPredictions Reachable States Ahead Individuals Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 3 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations

Prior panel's dsDNA via PriorObservation FK, for trend.

In RuleSpeak

A serology observation's prior c3 is the complement c3 of the serology observation's prior observation.

In English

The complement c3 of the linked prior observation.

As a formula
= INDEX(Complement C3, MATCH(Prior Observation, Serology Observation ID, 0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
●Complement C3SerologyObservations C3 mg/dL (RAW lab). ⇢Prior ObservationSerologyObservations Self-FK -> the prior panel in this individual's series (seq-1). NULL for the first. ●Serology Observation IDSerologyObservations Slug PK: sero-{ind}-{seq}.
Consumers 1 direct +21 transitive rules that read this one

↗ Prior C4 Lookup 1 hop from ground truth number DR-251
In RuleSpeak

A serology observation's prior c4 is the complement c4 of the serology observation's prior observation.

In English

The complement c4 of the linked prior observation.

As a formula
= INDEX(Complement C4, MATCH(Prior Observation, Serology Observation ID, 0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
●Complement C4SerologyObservations C4 mg/dL (RAW lab). ⇢Prior ObservationSerologyObservations Self-FK -> the prior panel in this individual's series (seq-1). NULL for the first. ●Serology Observation IDSerologyObservations Slug PK: sero-{ind}-{seq}.
Consumers 1 direct +21 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Complement Trend SerologyObservations Is Pre Nephritic Signature Panel SerologyObservations Sledai Serology Points SerologyObservations Progression State Key SerologyObservations Count Pre Nephritic Signature Panels Individuals Sledai Score SerologyObservations Progression State Order SerologyObservations Is in Pre Nephritic Signature Cluster Individuals Signature Strength Individuals Latest Sledai Score Individuals Max Progression State Order Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals Nephritis Progression State Key Individuals Is Disease Progressing Individuals Current Progression State ID Individuals Individual Progression State Key IndividualPredictions Individual is Disease Progressing IndividualPredictions Reachable States Ahead Individuals Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 3 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Complement C4 SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations

Prior C4 via PriorObservation FK.

ƒ Anti Ds Dna Trend Calculated 2 hops from ground truth string DR-252
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's anti ds dna trend is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “Stable” if the prior anti ds dna IU is blank
  2. the literal “Rising” if the anti ds dna IU is greater than the prior anti ds dna IU times 1.25
  3. the literal “Falling” if the anti ds dna IU is less than the prior anti ds dna IU times 0.8
  4. the literal “Stable” otherwise
In English

If prior anti ds dna iu is blank then "Stable", otherwise if anti ds dna iu is greater than (prior anti ds dna iu times 1.25) then "Rising", otherwise if anti ds dna iu is less than (prior anti ds dna iu times 0.8) then "Falling", otherwise "Stable".

As a formula
= IF(ISBLANK(Prior Anti Ds Dna IU),"Stable",IF(Anti Ds Dna IU>Prior Anti Ds Dna IU*1.25,"Rising",IF(Anti Ds Dna IU<Prior Anti Ds Dna IU*0.8,"Falling","Stable")))
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
↗Prior Anti Ds Dna IUSerologyObservations The anti ds dna iu of the linked prior observation. ●Anti Ds Dna IUSerologyObservations anti-dsDNA titre IU/mL (RAW lab).
Consumers 3 direct +18 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Is Pre Nephritic Signature Panel SerologyObservations ƒ Sledai Serology Points SerologyObservations ƒ Progression State Key SerologyObservations Count Pre Nephritic Signature Panels Individuals Sledai Score SerologyObservations Progression State Order SerologyObservations Is in Pre Nephritic Signature Cluster Individuals Signature Strength Individuals Latest Sledai Score Individuals Max Progression State Order Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals Nephritis Progression State Key Individuals Is Disease Progressing Individuals Current Progression State ID Individuals Individual Progression State Key IndividualPredictions Individual is Disease Progressing IndividualPredictions Reachable States Ahead Individuals Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 3 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations

Rising/Falling/Stable vs prior panel (derived from raw).

ƒ Complement Trend Calculated 2 hops from ground truth string DR-253
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's complement trend is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “Stable” if the prior c3 is blank
  2. the literal “Falling” if the complement c3 plus the complement c4 is less than the prior c3 plus the prior c4 times 0.85
  3. the literal “Rising” if the complement c3 plus the complement c4 is greater than the prior c3 plus the prior c4 times 1.15
  4. the literal “Stable” otherwise
In English

If prior c3 is blank then "Stable", otherwise if (complement c3 plus complement c4) is less than ((prior c3 plus prior c4) times 0.85) then "Falling", otherwise if (complement c3 plus complement c4) is greater than ((prior c3 plus prior c4) times 1.15) then "Rising", otherwise "Stable".

As a formula
= IF(ISBLANK(Prior C3),"Stable",IF((Complement C3+Complement C4)<(Prior C3+Prior C4)*0.85,"Falling",IF((Complement C3+Complement C4)>(Prior C3+Prior C4)*1.15,"Rising","Stable")))
Inputs 4 fields this rule reads
↗Prior C3SerologyObservations The complement c3 of the linked prior observation. ●Complement C3SerologyObservations C3 mg/dL (RAW lab). ●Complement C4SerologyObservations C4 mg/dL (RAW lab). ↗Prior C4SerologyObservations The complement c4 of the linked prior observation.
Consumers 3 direct +18 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Is Pre Nephritic Signature Panel SerologyObservations ƒ Sledai Serology Points SerologyObservations ƒ Progression State Key SerologyObservations Count Pre Nephritic Signature Panels Individuals Sledai Score SerologyObservations Progression State Order SerologyObservations Is in Pre Nephritic Signature Cluster Individuals Signature Strength Individuals Latest Sledai Score Individuals Max Progression State Order Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals Nephritis Progression State Key Individuals Is Disease Progressing Individuals Current Progression State ID Individuals Individual Progression State Key IndividualPredictions Individual is Disease Progressing IndividualPredictions Reachable States Ahead Individuals Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 4 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations

Rising/Falling/Stable on C3+C4 vs prior (derived).

ƒ Is Pre Nephritic Signature Panel Calculated 3 hops from ground truth boolean DR-254
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's is pre nephritic signature panel is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if all of these hold:
    • the anti ds dna trend is the literal “Rising”
    • the complement trend is the literal “Falling”
  2. false otherwise
In English

If anti ds dna trend is "Rising" and complement trend is "Falling" then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(AND(Anti Ds Dna Trend="Rising",Complement Trend="Falling"),TRUE(),FALSE())
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
ƒAnti Ds Dna TrendSerologyObservations If prior anti ds dna iu is blank then "Stable", otherwise if anti ds dna iu is greater than (prior anti ds dna iu times 1.25) then "Rising", otherwise if anti ds dna iu is less than (prior anti ds dna iu times 0.8) then "Falling", otherwise "Stable". ƒComplement TrendSerologyObservations If prior c3 is blank then "Stable", otherwise if (complement c3 plus complement c4) is less than ((prior c3 plus prior c4) times 0.85) then "Falling", otherwise if (complement c3 plus complement c4) is greater than ((prior c3 plus prior c4) times 1.15) then "Rising", otherwise "Stable".
Consumers 1 direct +2 transitive rules that read this one
Σ Count Pre Nephritic Signature Panels Individuals Is in Pre Nephritic Signature Cluster Individuals Signature Strength Individuals
Ground truth at the leaves 5 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations

The pre-nephritic serology signature at THIS panel: rising anti-dsDNA + falling complement (the serological trajectory that precedes/tracks overt renal involvement). Emergent from the raw series, not a label anyone assigned. (Proteinuria is the OUTCOME the signature precedes, so it is deliberately NOT part of the signal.)

ƒ Is Significant Proteinuria Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-255
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's is significant proteinuria is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if the proteinuria g per day is at least 0.5
  2. false otherwise
In English

If proteinuria g per day is at least 0.5 then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(Proteinuria G Per Day>=0.5,TRUE(),FALSE())
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Proteinuria G Per DaySerologyObservations urine protein g/day (RAW lab).
Consumers 2 direct +15 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Sledai Renal Points SerologyObservations ƒ Progression State Key SerologyObservations Sledai Score SerologyObservations Progression State Order SerologyObservations Latest Sledai Score Individuals Max Progression State Order Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals Nephritis Progression State Key Individuals Is Disease Progressing Individuals Current Progression State ID Individuals Individual Progression State Key IndividualPredictions Individual is Disease Progressing IndividualPredictions Reachable States Ahead Individuals Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations

proteinuria >= 0.5 g/day.

ƒ Is Nephrotic Range Proteinuria Calculated 1 hop from ground truth boolean DR-256
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's is nephrotic range proteinuria is determined by the following priority:

  1. true if the proteinuria g per day is at least 3.0
  2. false otherwise
In English

If proteinuria g per day is at least 3.0 then true(), otherwise false().

As a formula
= IF(Proteinuria G Per Day>=3.0,TRUE(),FALSE())
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Proteinuria G Per DaySerologyObservations urine protein g/day (RAW lab).
Consumers 2 direct +15 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Sledai Renal Points SerologyObservations ƒ Progression State Key SerologyObservations Sledai Score SerologyObservations Progression State Order SerologyObservations Latest Sledai Score Individuals Max Progression State Order Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals Nephritis Progression State Key Individuals Is Disease Progressing Individuals Current Progression State ID Individuals Individual Progression State Key IndividualPredictions Individual is Disease Progressing IndividualPredictions Reachable States Ahead Individuals Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations

proteinuria >= 3.0 g/day.

ƒ Sledai Renal Points Calculated 2 hops from ground truth number DR-257
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's sledai renal points is determined by the following priority:

  1. 8 if any of these hold:
    • the is nephrotic range proteinuria flag is set
    • the has active urinary sediment flag is set
  2. 4 if the is significant proteinuria flag is set
  3. 0 otherwise
In English

If is nephrotic range proteinuria or has active urinary sediment then 8, otherwise if is significant proteinuria then 4, otherwise 0.

As a formula
= IF(OR(Is Nephrotic Range Proteinuria,Has Active Urinary Sediment),8,IF(Is Significant Proteinuria,4,0))
Inputs 3 fields this rule reads
ƒIs Nephrotic Range ProteinuriaSerologyObservations If proteinuria g per day is at least 3.0 then true(), otherwise false(). ●Has Active Urinary SedimentSerologyObservations active casts/hematuria (RAW observation). ƒIs Significant ProteinuriaSerologyObservations If proteinuria g per day is at least 0.5 then true(), otherwise false().
Consumers 1 direct +3 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Sledai Score SerologyObservations Latest Sledai Score Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals
Ground truth at the leaves 2 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations

SLEDAI-style renal sub-score (0/4/8) from proteinuria + sediment.

ƒ Sledai Serology Points Calculated 3 hops from ground truth number DR-258
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's sledai serology points is determined by the following priority:

  1. 4 if all of these hold:
    • the complement trend is the literal “Falling”
    • the anti ds dna trend is the literal “Rising”
  2. 2 if any of these hold:
    • the complement trend is the literal “Falling”
    • the anti ds dna trend is the literal “Rising”
  3. 0 otherwise
In English

If complement trend is "Falling" and anti ds dna trend is "Rising" then 4, otherwise if complement trend is "Falling" or anti ds dna trend is "Rising" then 2, otherwise 0.

As a formula
= IF(AND(Complement Trend="Falling",Anti Ds Dna Trend="Rising"),4,IF(OR(Complement Trend="Falling",Anti Ds Dna Trend="Rising"),2,0))
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
ƒComplement TrendSerologyObservations If prior c3 is blank then "Stable", otherwise if (complement c3 plus complement c4) is less than ((prior c3 plus prior c4) times 0.85) then "Falling", otherwise if (complement c3 plus complement c4) is greater than ((prior c3 plus prior c4) times 1.15) then "Rising", otherwise "Stable". ƒAnti Ds Dna TrendSerologyObservations If prior anti ds dna iu is blank then "Stable", otherwise if anti ds dna iu is greater than (prior anti ds dna iu times 1.25) then "Rising", otherwise if anti ds dna iu is less than (prior anti ds dna iu times 0.8) then "Falling", otherwise "Stable".
Consumers 1 direct +3 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Sledai Score SerologyObservations Latest Sledai Score Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals
Ground truth at the leaves 5 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations

SLEDAI-style serology sub-score (0/2/4) from low-complement + raised dsDNA.

ƒ Sledai Score Calculated 4 hops from ground truth number DR-259
In RuleSpeak

A serology observation's sledai score is computed as the sledai renal points plus the sledai serology points.

In English

Sledai renal points plus sledai serology points.

As a formula
= Sledai Renal Points+Sledai Serology Points
Inputs 2 fields this rule reads
ƒSledai Renal PointsSerologyObservations If is nephrotic range proteinuria or has active urinary sediment then 8, otherwise if is significant proteinuria then 4, otherwise 0. ƒSledai Serology PointsSerologyObservations If complement trend is "Falling" and anti ds dna trend is "Rising" then 4, otherwise if complement trend is "Falling" or anti ds dna trend is "Rising" then 2, otherwise 0.
Consumers 1 direct +2 transitive rules that read this one
Σ Latest Sledai Score Individuals Activity Tier Individuals Is High Disease Activity Individuals
Ground truth at the leaves 7 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations

Derived SLEDAI-style activity score = renal + serology points.

ƒ Progression State Key Calculated 3 hops from ground truth string DR-260
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's progression state key is determined by the following priority:

  1. the literal “BiopsyIndicated” if any of these hold:
    • the is nephrotic range proteinuria flag is set
    • the has active urinary sediment flag is set
  2. the literal “RenalFlareRisk” if the proteinuria g per day is at least 1.0
  3. the literal “EarlyNephritis” if the is significant proteinuria flag is set
  4. the literal “SerologicActive” if all of these hold:
    • the anti ds dna trend is the literal “Rising”
    • the complement trend is the literal “Falling”
  5. the literal “PresymptomaticAutoimmunity” otherwise
In English

If is nephrotic range proteinuria or has active urinary sediment then "BiopsyIndicated", otherwise if proteinuria g per day is at least 1.0 then "RenalFlareRisk", otherwise if is significant proteinuria then "EarlyNephritis", otherwise if anti ds dna trend is "Rising" and complement trend is "Falling" then "SerologicActive", otherwise "PresymptomaticAutoimmunity".

As a formula
= IF(OR(Is Nephrotic Range Proteinuria,Has Active Urinary Sediment),"BiopsyIndicated",IF(Proteinuria G Per Day>=1.0,"RenalFlareRisk",IF(Is Significant Proteinuria,"EarlyNephritis",IF(AND(Anti Ds Dna Trend="Rising",Complement Trend="Falling"),"SerologicActive","PresymptomaticAutoimmunity"))))
Inputs 6 fields this rule reads
ƒIs Nephrotic Range ProteinuriaSerologyObservations If proteinuria g per day is at least 3.0 then true(), otherwise false(). ●Has Active Urinary SedimentSerologyObservations active casts/hematuria (RAW observation). ●Proteinuria G Per DaySerologyObservations urine protein g/day (RAW lab). ƒIs Significant ProteinuriaSerologyObservations If proteinuria g per day is at least 0.5 then true(), otherwise false(). ƒAnti Ds Dna TrendSerologyObservations If prior anti ds dna iu is blank then "Stable", otherwise if anti ds dna iu is greater than (prior anti ds dna iu times 1.25) then "Rising", otherwise if anti ds dna iu is less than (prior anti ds dna iu times 0.8) then "Falling", otherwise "Stable". ƒComplement TrendSerologyObservations If prior c3 is blank then "Stable", otherwise if (complement c3 plus complement c4) is less than ((prior c3 plus prior c4) times 0.85) then "Falling", otherwise if (complement c3 plus complement c4) is greater than ((prior c3 plus prior c4) times 1.15) then "Rising", otherwise "Stable".
Consumers 1 direct +10 transitive rules that read this one
ƒ Progression State Order SerologyObservations Max Progression State Order Individuals Nephritis Progression State Key Individuals Is Disease Progressing Individuals Current Progression State ID Individuals Individual Progression State Key IndividualPredictions Individual is Disease Progressing IndividualPredictions Reachable States Ahead Individuals Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 7 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations

Disease state IMPLIED by THIS panel (derived purely from raw leaves).

ƒ Progression State Order Calculated 4 hops from ground truth number DR-261
In RuleSpeak

The serology observation's progression state order is determined by the following priority:

  1. 5 if the progression state key is the literal “BiopsyIndicated”
  2. 4 if the progression state key is the literal “RenalFlareRisk”
  3. 3 if the progression state key is the literal “EarlyNephritis”
  4. 2 if the progression state key is the literal “SerologicActive”
  5. 1 otherwise
In English

If progression state key is "BiopsyIndicated" then 5, otherwise if progression state key is "RenalFlareRisk" then 4, otherwise if progression state key is "EarlyNephritis" then 3, otherwise if progression state key is "SerologicActive" then 2, otherwise 1.

As a formula
= IF(Progression State Key="BiopsyIndicated",5,IF(Progression State Key="RenalFlareRisk",4,IF(Progression State Key="EarlyNephritis",3,IF(Progression State Key="SerologicActive",2,1))))
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
ƒProgression State KeySerologyObservations If is nephrotic range proteinuria or has active urinary sediment then "BiopsyIndicated", otherwise if proteinuria g per day is at least 1.0 then "RenalFlareRisk", otherwise if is significant proteinuria then "EarlyNephritis", otherwise if anti ds dna trend is "Rising" and complement trend is "Falling" then "SerologicActive", otherwise "PresymptomaticAutoimmunity".
Consumers 1 direct +9 transitive rules that read this one
Σ Max Progression State Order Individuals Nephritis Progression State Key Individuals Is Disease Progressing Individuals Current Progression State ID Individuals Individual Progression State Key IndividualPredictions Individual is Disease Progressing IndividualPredictions Reachable States Ahead Individuals Recommended Treatment Line IndividualPredictions Treatment Line Deciding Factor IndividualPredictions Progression Vs Actionability Disagree IndividualPredictions
Ground truth at the leaves 7 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Proteinuria G Per Day SerologyObservations ● Has Active Urinary Sediment SerologyObservations ● Anti Ds Dna IU SerologyObservations ⇢ Prior Observation SerologyObservations ● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations ● Complement C3 SerologyObservations ● Complement C4 SerologyObservations

Numeric severity order of THIS panel's implied state (0..5). Lets the individual's current state be a MAXIFS over panels (highest state reached).

ƒ Relative Path Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-262
In RuleSpeak

A serology observation's relative path is computed as the literal “/admin/serology/”, followed by the serology observation ID.

In English

"/admin/serology/" joined with serology observation id.

As a formula
= "/admin/serology/" & Serology Observation ID
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Serology Observation IDSerologyObservations Slug PK: sero-{ind}-{seq}.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Serology Observation ID SerologyObservations

Path.

Therapy Option

Therapy lookup for the treatment-line-selection DAG (MMF/belimumab/anifrolumab/secukinumab).

● Therapy Label Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Therapy name.

● Targets Pathway Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Pathway this therapy targets (matches CausalMechanisms.TargetPathway).

● Line Ordinal Ground truth number

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype number); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Treatment-line ordinal (1=first-line/induction).

● Preferred When Ground truth string

Ground truth. Written directly to the database (datatype string); not computed from anything else. Everything derived ultimately traces back to values like this one.

Clinical context where preferred.

ƒ Name Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-263
In RuleSpeak

A therapy option's name is computed as the therapy label.

In English

Therapy label.

As a formula
= Therapy Label
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Therapy LabelTherapyOptions Therapy name.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on
● Therapy Label TherapyOptions

Echo.

ƒ Relative Path Calculated 1 hop from ground truth string DR-264
In RuleSpeak

A therapy option's relative path is computed as the literal “/admin/therapy-options/”, followed by the therapy option ID.

In English

"/admin/therapy-options/" joined with therapy option id.

As a formula
= "/admin/therapy-options/" & Therapy Option ID
Inputs 1 fields this rule reads
●Therapy Option IDTherapyOptions Slug PK.
Ground truth at the leaves 1 the raw values this ultimately depends on

Path.

Rendered from the rulebook by the shared RuleSpeak engine (rulebook-rulespeak-core). The same engine narrates the React Explainer DAG, so English, Formula and RuleSpeak read identically across both.

● Ground truth ƒ Calculated Σ Aggregation ↗ Lookup ⇢ Relationship
